name: Praline Ice Cream Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups golden or light brown sugar, packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugars, buttermilk, butter, syrup, and baking soda in a heavy saucepan.
2. Bring to the boiling point.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla and nuts.
5. Cool completely before serving. The sauce will thicken.
